# Missing databases require confirmation.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/missing.db --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'does not exist; create it?'
stderr 'database creation not confirmed'
! exists $WORK/missing.db

# --yes creates and migrates missing databases without another prompt.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/created.db --yes --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'listen error:'
exists $WORK/created.db

# Existing databases are migrated before listener startup.
! exec mina serve --db $WORK/created.db --yes --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'listen error:'

# Omitting --db serves from an ephemeral in-memory accounting schema with a warning.
! exec mina serve --host 192.0.2.1 --port 0
stderr 'warning: no --db provided; using ephemeral in-memory accounting state'
stderr 'listen error:'

# The migrate command applies migrations without starting an HTTP listener.
exec mina migrate --db $WORK/migrated.db --yes
! stderr 'listen error:'
exists $WORK/migrated.db

# Existing empty databases are not migrated when migration confirmation is declined.
duckdbtouch $WORK/needs-confirm.db
duckdbsnapshot $WORK/needs-confirm.db $WORK/needs-confirm.snapshot
stdin no.txt
! exec mina migrate --db $WORK/needs-confirm.db
stderr 'pending database migrations'
stderr 'database migrations not confirmed'
duckdbsnapshot $WORK/needs-confirm.db $WORK/needs-confirm.snapshot
duckdbtables $WORK/needs-confirm.db main
stdout '^0$'

# The migrate command accepts a custom accounting schema.
exec mina migrate --db $WORK/quoted-schema.db --schema select --yes
exists $WORK/quoted-schema.db

# The migrate command does not accept HTTP listener flags.
! exec mina migrate --db $WORK/migrated.db --host 127.0.0.1
stderr 'unknown flag: --host'

-- no.txt --
n
